tasks.label: Run sensors launch
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator sensors.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair

tasks.label: Run mapping launch
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair

tasks.label: Run mapping launch without RViz
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Run mapping launch and auto save map
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch map_generator mapping.launch.py left_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB0 right_lidar_port:=/dev/ttyUSB1 arduino_port:=/dev/arduino_wheelchair auto_save_map:=true auto_save_delay:=5.0 save_map:=/home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/test_map

tasks.label: Save map manually
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/Mapping/install/setup.bash && ros2 run nav2_map_server map_saver_cli -f /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Other-Files/GeneralData/Maps/test_map

tasks.label: Build mapping_test
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && colcon build --packages-select mapping_test --build-base build --install-base install

tasks.label: Run mapping_test
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py

tasks.label: Run mapping_test without RViz
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch mapping_test mapping_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false

args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash && colcon build --packages-select localization_test --build-base build --install-base install

args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization_test localization_test.launch.py

tasks.label: Run localization_test without RViz
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch localization_test localization_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Build navigation_test
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest/install/setup.bash && colcon build --packages-select navigation_test --build-base build --install-base install

tasks.label: Run navigation_test without RViz
args: cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest && source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest/install/setup.bash && source /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest/install/setup.bash && source install/setup.bash && ros2 launch navigation_test navigation_test.launch.py use_rviz:=false

tasks.label: Build all test packages
args: source /opt/ros/jazzy/setup.bash && cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/MapGeneration/MappingTest && colcon build --packages-select mapping_test --build-base build --install-base install && source install/setup.bash && cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Positioning/Localization/LocalizationTest && colcon build --packages-select localization_test --build-base build --install-base install && source install/setup.bash && cd /home/rudrh/Autonomous-Wheelchair-System/Navigation/Pathfinding/NavigationTest && colcon build --packages-select navigation_test --build-base build --install-base install
